title: Support
lead: Open the support assistant to get help without leaving this page.
fallbackLead: The support assistant should open automatically. You can also open it here.
emptySubtitle: Ask a question or start with one of these topics.

suggestionPrompts.booking: I need help with a booking.
suggestionPrompts.cancel: I need help canceling a booking.
suggestionPrompts.provider: I want to become a provider.

disclaimer: AI support may make mistakes. It can check only limited support-safe order or payment details you select or reference.

emailMode.title: Write to support
emailMode.description: We will reply to your registered account email.
emailMode.accountEmailFallback: We will use the email address linked to your account.
emailMode.sendSuccess: Your message was sent. Support will reply to your registered email address.
emailMode.sendError: We could not send your message. Please try again.
emailMode.messageTooShort: Please enter a message before sending.
emailMode.notConnected: Email sending will be connected next.
emailMode.loginRequired: Please log in to contact support by email.

error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.

serverMessages.rateLimit: Too many support chat requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
serverMessages.outage: Support chat is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later or contact support.
serverMessages.empty: Please enter a support question so I can help.
serverMessages.abusive: I can help with support questions, but I cannot respond to abusive messages. Please contact support if you need help.
serverMessages.nonsense: I could not understand that request. Please rephrase your support question or contact support.
serverMessages.clarify: What do you need help with: a booking, payment, cancellation, provider profile, registration, or dispute?
serverMessages.unsupportedAccount: I can check only limited support-safe details for a specific order, booking, payment, or invoice you select or reference. I cannot browse full account history, unrelated records, Stripe data, or raw account records.
serverMessages.unsupportedAction: I cannot cancel, refund, charge, or update an order from this chat. I can explain the rules or help check a selected order safely.
serverMessages.uncertain: I do not have enough approved support information to answer that reliably. Try asking about a specific booking, payment, cancellation, provider setup, registration, or marketplace rule.
serverMessages.clarifyGeneral: What do you need help with: a booking, payment, cancellation, provider profile, registration, or dispute?
serverMessages.clarifyBooking: Do you mean a requested booking, a planned booking, a canceled booking, payment for a booking, or changing/canceling it?
serverMessages.clarifyPayment: Do you mean a paid order, a payment still pending, an invoice, or when payment becomes due?
serverMessages.clarifyCancellation: Is the booking still requested, already planned, or canceled, and are you trying to cancel it or understand why cancellation is blocked?
serverMessages.clarifyProvider: Do you need help creating a provider profile, completing onboarding, managing services, or understanding provider payments?
serverMessages.lowConfidenceFollowUp: I want to make sure I understand. Are you asking about a specific booking, a payment, a cancellation, or general platform rules?
serverMessages.unsupportedBroadAccount: I cannot browse or export your full account history from this chat. Ask about a specific order, booking, payment, or invoice, or open the relevant dashboard page for the full list.
serverMessages.accountContextUnavailable: I can explain the rules, but I cannot check account-specific details unless you are signed in and the request is within the support-safe lookup scope.
serverMessages.unsafeActionBlocked: I cannot perform that action from chat. I can explain the rules or help you check whether a selected order is eligible.

handoffAccount: For account-specific help, contact support with your order, invoice, or account details.
handoffGeneral: If this does not answer your question, contact support for help.
